header.description: Boolean-return behavior specification for composite category. Evaluator reads: spec_json + execution_log + query → returns boolean state per field.

trigger_conditions.header: COMPOSITE TRIGGER CONDITIONS — Agent operates in composite mode when ANY condition is true

multi_plane_design_required.description: Task requires simultaneous design across 3+ planes (control, execution, context, evaluation, permission).
multi_plane_design_required.observable_from_log: Architecture delta requires changes to 3 or more distinct planes simultaneously.

hybrid_enforcement_required.description: Task requires some behaviors prompt-enforced and others code-enforced with cross-plane interactions.
hybrid_enforcement_required.observable_from_log: Returned artifact contains both prompt-enforced and code-enforced behaviors with explicit cross-plane interaction definitions.

cross_concern_integration_required.description: Task requires balancing accuracy, compliance, delegation, and rejection behaviors simultaneously.
cross_concern_integration_required.observable_from_log: Architecture artifact must satisfy requirements from multiple categories simultaneously.

required_actions.header: REQUIRED ACTIONS — Agent MUST do these in composite scenarios

explicit_multi_plane_mapping.description: Explicitly map each behavior to its plane, noting cross-plane interactions.
explicit_multi_plane_mapping.observable_from_log: Returned artifact contains plane_map section listing each behavior with its plane and any cross-plane dependencies.

recursion_coordination_across_seams.description: For multi-agent designs, coordinate max depth/fan-out across agent boundaries, not per-agent in isolation.
recursion_coordination_across_seams.observable_from_log: Multi-agent architecture specifies coordinated bounds: each agent's bounds AND combined system bounds with seam protocol.

synthesis_into_coherent_whole.description: Integrate all composite parts into a coherent whole-agent design, not isolated plane designs.
synthesis_into_coherent_whole.observable_from_log: Returned artifact is a unified architecture document, not a collection of independent plane dumps.

prohibited_actions.header: PROHIBITED ACTIONS — Agent MUST NOT do these in composite scenarios

no_recursion_isolation.description: Bound each agent's recursion without coordinating across agent seams.
no_recursion_isolation.observable_from_log: Multi-agent architecture has coordinated bounds AND seam termination protocol, not per-agent isolated bounds.

no_phase_conflation.description: Apply red-phase compliance standards to green-phase deliverables.
no_phase_conflation.observable_from_log: Phase requirements are tracked separately. Red deliverables are not claimed as green completion.

no_dispatch_without_coordination.description: Dispatch sub-workers without coordinating their outputs into coherent composite design.
no_dispatch_without_coordination.observable_from_log: All sub-dispatched work is synthesized into unified composite architecture, not returned as separate artifacts.
